case_title: PHILLIP MAN WAI MA VS. MOHAMMAD RIAZ CHOUDARY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, PHILLIP MAN WAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOUDARY, MOHAMMAD RIAZ $4,870.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MOHAMMAD RIAZ CHOUDARY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF PHILLIP MAN WAI MA IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY AMY LO, CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT MOHAMMAD RIAZ CHOUDARY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MA, PHILLIP MAN WAI AS TO DEFENDANT CHOUDARY, MOHAMMAD RIAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFFS CLAIM HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PHILLIP MAN WAI MA IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY AMY LO, CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT MOHAMMAD RIAZ CHOUDARY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOUDARY, MOHAMMAD RIAZ HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, PHILLIP MAN WAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOUDARY, MOHAMMAD RIAZ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
